mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_transactions (id, point_account_id, amount, type, reference_type, reference_id, description, created_at) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), #{pointAccountId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{description}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, point_account_id, amount, type, reference_type, reference_id, description, created_at FROM point_transactions WHERE point_account_id = #{pointAccountId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC
